/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/Core/Aplicacion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/Core/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/EstructuraDeDatos/MatrizDispersa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/EstructuraDeDatos/Nodo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HojaCalculoAED.dir/src/GUI/VentanaPrincipal.cpp.o -o HojaCalculoAED  /usr/lib/libsfml-graphics.so.3.1.0 /usr/lib/libsfml-window.so.3.1.0 /usr/lib/libsfml-system.so.3.1.0
